input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.18 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.18
            TITLE: nonflammable material

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.18: Nonflammable Material
F.1.18 Nonflammable Material  
Metal or a Non Metallic material which meets UL94-V0, FAR25 or approved equivalent

final_answer: rule F.1.18: Nonflammable Material Metal or a Non Metallic material which meets UL94-V0, FAR25 or approved equivalent
